notes: Strict identity-preserving edit prompts for Saudi Dream Jobs. 18+ high-quality professions.
shared_constraints: Edit-only mode. Output must be a zoomed-out full-body portrait: full body should appear from head to shoes so the entire uniform is visible. Change ONLY clothing and background to match the selected job. The outfit must be the full realistic uniform/professional clothing of the selected job, complete and context-accurate. The background must be job-related, visually impressive, clear, and richly detailed, with realistic depth and perspective. Keep the image photorealistic with believable lighting, shadows, skin texture, and fabric details. Face handling: do not paste/copy the face. Preserve the same student identity while naturally integrating it into the new scene. Keep the same core identity: eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, facial proportions, skin tone, hairline, hairstyle, and age range (8-12). Allow subtle harmonization so the face fits the scene: adjust lighting direction, color temperature, contrast, and perspective slightly to match the body and background. Keep expression close to input. No beauty retouching, no plastic skin, no makeup look, no exaggerated smoothing. No text, no logos, no readable badge text, no watermark, no cartoon/anime style, no extra people, no face distortion.

prompts.architect: Transform this child into an architect. Wearing a professional outfit, holding a blueprint or architectural scale. Background: modern bright architectural studio with building sketches and scale models. Realistic lighting and professional photography style.
prompts.astronaut: Transform this child into an astronaut. Wearing a realistic NASA-style spacesuit with mission patches. Background: high-tech spacecraft interior or lunar station, with control panels and a view of Earth through a portal. Cinematic lighting.
prompts.businessman: Transform this child into a businessman. Wearing a sharp dark tailored business suit and tie. Background: premium corporate penthouse office with glass windows and a city skyline. Professional business photography vibe.
prompts.businesswoman: Transform this child into a businesswoman. Wearing a professional formal blazer and modest business attire. Background: premium corporate boardroom with sleek furniture and natural daylight. Elegant professional look.
prompts.cook: Transform this child into a professional cook. Wearing a clean white chef's hat (toque) and coat. Background: high-end restaurant kitchen with copper pans, ingredients, and warm kitchen lighting. Sharp focus on the child.
prompts.doctor: Transform this child into a doctor. Wearing a crisp white lab coat over professional attire with a stethoscope around the neck. Background: clean modern clinic corridor or examination room with soft medical lighting.
prompts.driver: Transform this child into a professional car driver. Wearing a racing suit or professional chauffeur uniform. Background: high-performance car interior or a prestige garage setting. Dynamic lighting and high detail.
prompts.engineer: Transform this child into an engineer. Wearing a realistic safety hard hat and reflecting safety vest. Background: large-scale construction site or high-tech manufacturing plant with technical machinery. Industrial cinematic lighting.
prompts.fashion_designer: Transform this child into a fashion designer. Wearing a stylish artistic outfit, holding a measuring tape or sketching a dress. Background: bright fashion atelier with fabric rolls, mannequins, and mood boards. Creative studio lighting.
prompts.farmer: Transform this child into a modern farmer. Wearing a denim outfit or practical field vest. Background: beautiful green organic farm or a field with high-tech agriculture equipment. Warm natural sunlight.
prompts.flight_attendant: Transform this child into a flight attendant. Wearing a sharp airline uniform with a scarf or tie. Background: premium business class cabin of a modern airplane with windows showing clouds. Soft cabin lighting.
prompts.firefighter: Transform this child into a firefighter. Wearing full protective yellow or black firefighting gear and helmet. Background: fire station with a red fire truck and equipment. Intense, dramatic lighting.
prompts.journalist: Transform this child into a news journalist. Wearing professional attire, holding a microphone or standing in front of a camera. Background: busy newsroom studio or a location shot in a prestigious city square. Natural professional lighting.
prompts.manager: Transform this child into a manager. Wearing smart business attire (shirt and blazer). Background: high-end modern coworking space or corporate managing office. Leadership vibes, professional lighting.
prompts.mechanic: Transform this child into a mechanic. Wearing practical industrial overalls. Background: prestige auto repair shop with high-end cars and various tools. Realistic workshop lighting.
prompts.photographer: Transform this child into a photographer. Wearing a utility vest and holding a professional DSLR camera. Background: beautiful outdoor scenic location or a high-end photography studio. Sharp, artistic focus.
prompts.pilot: Transform this child into an airline pilot. Wearing a pilot uniform with stripes and a captain's hat. Background: high-tech airplane cockpit with glass screens and switches. Realistic flight deck lighting.
prompts.teacher: Transform this child into a teacher. Wearing neat professional educational attire. Background: modern bright classroom with a digital board and educational books. Warm, friendly daylight.
prompts.waiter: Transform this child into a waiter. Wearing a professional white shirt and black vest. Background: elegant fine-dining luxury restaurant with table settings and soft ambient lighting.
prompts.waitress: Transform this child into a waitress. Wearing a professional white blouse and elegant vest. Background: elegant fine-dining luxury restaurant with table settings and soft ambient lighting.
prompts.police: Transform this child into a Saudi police officer. Wearing a dark green police uniform. Background: clean city intersection with a patrol context. Realistic daylight.
prompts.software_engineer: Transform this child into a software engineer. Wearing a casual smart outfit and headphones. Background: modern tech office with multiple monitors showing code. Cool cyberpunk-inspired office lighting.
